PROFILE.name: Somashekar
PROFILE.title: Senior Platform Engineering & Enterprise Infrastructure Leader
PROFILE.summary: Senior Platform Engineering and Enterprise Infrastructure Leader with 14+ years of experience delivering technology transformation across Fortune 500 healthcare and retail enterprises. Proven track record of leading globally distributed engineering organizations, modernizing enterprise infrastructure, driving cloud adoption, implementing AI-enabled operational capabilities, and building high-performing engineering teams that deliver measurable business outcomes.

ARCHITECTURE_LABS.title: Project: Vulcan Grid
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.author: SOMASHEKAR BG
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.description: A distributed ledger implementation optimized for sub-50ms finality in high-throughput industrial IoT environments. Leverages custom consensus algorithms to ensure structural integrity under network partitions.

ARCHITECTURE_LABS.title: Zero-Trust Mesh
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.author: SOMASHEKAR BG
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.description: Implementation of mTLS-driven service mesh for enterprise Kubernetes clusters. Automated rotating certificates, identity-based access control, and absolute network isolation boundaries.

ARCHITECTURE_LABS.title: Kernel Tuning Suite
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.author: SOMASHEKAR BG
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.description: Optimizing Linux kernel parameters (scheduler policy, memory lock, huge pages, IRQ affinity) for high-frequency low-latency workloads. Results in a 15% reduction in tail latency.

ARCHITECTURE_LABS.title: Neural Infrastructure
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.author: SOMASHEKAR BG
ARCHITECTURE_LABS.description: Self-healing server clusters managed by autonomous reinforcement learning agents. High-fidelity real-time resource reallocation and predictive scaling based on automated neural traffic models.

PRODUCTS_LIST.title: Hyper MCP
PRODUCTS_LIST.description: Mission Critical Platform engineered for ultra-low latency infrastructure orchestration. Features real-time node synchronization, auto-scaling telemetry, and zero-downtime cluster transfers for large global enterprise infrastructure.

PRODUCTS_LIST.title: Hyper Resume Parser
PRODUCTS_LIST.description: An automated enterprise talent parsing engine that leverages deep neural networks and custom vector search schemas to instantly map applicant professional histories directly to active infrastructure demand parameters.

PRODUCTS_LIST.title: Sitman AI (Situational SRE)
PRODUCTS_LIST.description: Situational SRE Manager AI utilizing multi-modal anomaly detectors. Predicts server hardware degradation and cooling unit failure 72 hours in advance via acoustic spectral and thermo-dynamic telemetry analyses.

ARCHITECTURE_INSIGHTS.title: Scaling Edge Nodes in Post-Cloud Architectures
Reducing Latency by 40% for Global FinTech
Autonomous Mesh Networks for Rugged Sites
